summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience. Expert in AWS Glue, S3, Athena, Redshift, PySpark, SQL, and Python. Skilled in ETL/ELT pipelines, data modeling, data quality, and building scalable reporting layers.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints using Python/Pandas and AWS Glue/Redshift.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas and built ML forecasting models (Prophet, scikit-learn) predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.
Integrated monitoring feeds (TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics) into unified reporting dashboards with Streamlit/matplotlib/seaborn/plotly.
Managed large-scale PySpark distributed data pipelines, ensuring data quality and operational reliability.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring and implemented End-User Monitoring (EUM) with transaction tracing.
Led data analysis project for real-user performance metrics to optimize system performance.
Participated in cloud migration planning to AWS, evaluating monitoring tools and APM readiness.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting
skills.Cloud & Data: AWS Glue, Athena, S3, Redshift, PySpark, Apache Spark, Hive/Hadoop, Data Warehousing, ETL Design & Optimization
skills.AI/ML: Capacity Forecasting, Prophet, scikit-learn, Telemetry Analysis
skills.Tools & Infra: Dynatrace (AppMon, Synthetics, EUM/RUM, Transaction Tracing), BMC TrueSight / TSCO, CA APM / Introscope, AppDynamics, Docker, Git, Airflow, Streamlit, Linux/Unix
skills.Legacy: C++, Java, PL/SQL, Oracle RAC, WebLogic / WebSphere, VB6 / VC++

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed serverless AWS data platform with S3, Glue, Athena, and PySpark. Built Text-to-SQL GenAI agents and optimized ETL/data access at scale.
